vocab.ecco: here; there you go (used to draw attention)

vocab.mi iscriverei: I would write; I would comment
vocab.ne: about it; of it (pronoun, refers to previous topic)

vocab.a raccontarci: to tell each other; to talk to each other

vocab.la cosa fondamentale: the fundamental thing; the main thing
vocab.andare a: to go to; to start to (do something)

vocab.ci ritroviamo: we find ourselves; we end up
vocab.andare a: go to; proceed to (note: often used to indicate intention or process)

vocab.comincio col dire: I start by saying; let me begin by saying
vocab.nella grande maggior parte dei casi: in the vast majority of cases

vocab.vi mettereste: you would put yourselves; you would place yourselves (reflexive conditional)
you would place yourselves; you would stand

vocab.siamo fermi: we are stopped; we are still

vocab.posizionarsi: to position oneself; to place oneself

vocab.punta del piede: tip of the foot; ball of the foot

vocab.ci renderemo conto: we will realize; we will notice

vocab.ecco che: here; here is (note: signals a result or explanation)
vocab.molleggiati: springy; bouncy (note: describes a relaxed, flexible posture)
vocab.siamo in una situazione di: we are in a situation of

vocab.non dobbiamo: we must not; we don't have to
vocab.andare a trazionale: go to pull-up (note: 'trazionale' refers to a pulling movement, often a pull-up)
vocab.andiamo a fare: let's do; we go to do

vocab.sulla verticale: on the vertical; over the vertical line
vocab.del piede che è fermo: of the foot that is still; of the foot that is stationary
vocab.siamo liberi di: we are free to; we can
vocab.lo ri spostiamo: we move it again; we shift it again

vocab.rimettiamoci: let's get back; let's put ourselves again

vocab.immagino che: I imagine that; I suppose that
vocab.salite: you go up; you climb (plural, present)

vocab.in modo tale da: in such a way as to; so as to
vocab.che sta ferma: that stays still; that is still

vocab.andiamo a: we go to; we are going to

vocab.quello: that one (referring to something previously mentioned)

vocab.faremo: we will do; we will make

vocab.all'altezza delle spalle: at shoulder width; at the height of the shoulders

vocab.dovremo: we will have to; we must
vocab.attivisti: activists (note: likely a mishearing or typo, could mean 'appigli' = holds/grips in climbing context)

vocab.degli appoggi: supports; footholds (note: 'appoggi' can mean supports or footholds, context climbing or positioning)
vocab.in modo tale da: in such a way as to; so as to

vocab.un po' più esterno: a bit more external; a bit further out

vocab.come vi ho segnato: as I have shown you; as I have marked for you
vocab.si viene a creare: it is created; it comes to be created (impersonal construction)

vocab.sullo stesso orizzonte: on the same horizon (figurative: at the same level)
vocab.per farlo: to do it; in order to do it

vocab.voglio sottolineare: I want to emphasize; I want to underline

vocab.appoggi: supports; footholds (context: places to put your foot)
vocab.la punta del piede: the tip of the foot; the toe

vocab.così facendo: by doing so; in this way
vocab.stiamo offrendo: we are offering; we are providing
vocab.riusciamo a: we manage to; we are able to
vocab.scaricare: to unload; to release; to offload

vocab.fa molta più aderenza: has much more grip; sticks much more
vocab.appoggi molto piccoli: very small footholds; very small supports
vocab.ci sembrava: it seemed to us; it would seem to us

vocab.da un momento all'altro: at any moment; at any time
vocab.ci stiamo scaricando: we are unloading ourselves; we are releasing (ourselves)

vocab.questo per: this is to; this is for
vocab.non andare a: not go to; not end up (note: incomplete phrase)

vocab.riusciamo a tenere: manage to keep; are able to keep

vocab.andiamo a prendere: we go to get; we go to grab
vocab.un appiglio: a hold; a grip (something to hold onto)
vocab.che si trova: that is located; that is found
vocab.a un metro: at one meter; one meter away

vocab.di allungarvi: to stretch yourselves; to reach out
vocab.fareste: you would do; you would make

vocab.non dobbiamo: we must not; we don't have to
vocab.gli attivi: the holds (note: 'attivi' in climbing context means 'holds')

vocab.andare a prendere: to go get; to go pick up
